nodes.label: Unit tests for :mod:`omnigent.runner.uc_function`.  Tests cover:  - SQL statemen
Stub for a statement execution error.      :param message: Human-readable error
Minimal agent spec stub for dispatch tests.      :param local_tools: List of too
Minimal executor spec stub.      :param auth: Auth config, e.g. a ``_FakeDatabri
Minimal Databricks auth stub.      :param profile: Databricks config profile nam
Empty args produce a bare ``SELECT func()`` with no parameters.
Bare function names (no dots) are emitted unquoted.      Built-in SQL functions
catalog_path with SQL metacharacters is rejected.      Prevents SQL injection vi
Parameter names with SQL metacharacters are rejected.      Parameter names from
Single string arg produces one named parameter marker.
Multiple args produce comma-separated parameter markers.
Non-string values (int, bool, list, dict) are JSON-encoded.      The SQL Stateme
Calling without warehouse_id raises ValueError immediately.      This prevents a
ValueError when warehouse_id is None AND env var is unset.      Ensures the env
warehouse_id falls back to DATABRICKS_WAREHOUSE_ID env var.      When the caller
Successful UC function execution returns the scalar result.      Verifies that:
Failed statement execution raises RuntimeError with the error message.
NULL result from the function returns JSON null.
``_is_uc_function_tool`` returns False when agent_spec is None.
Profile falls back to ``executor.profile`` when auth is absent.
Returns None when no profile is configured anywhere.
